AEGEAN SEA.
HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS.
1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS SUNRISE TO SUNSET DAILY
   01 JAN THRU 31 DEC IN AREA BOUND BY
   38-02N 024-52E, 38-16N 025-21E,
   37-48N 025-49E, 37-34N 025-23E,
   37-42N 025-01E, 38-00N 024-52E.
2. CANCEL HYDROLANT 2533/10.
3. CANCEL THIS MSG 01 JAN 12.
